professional_summary.title: Data & Analytics Engineer
professional_summary.text: Data & Analytics Engineer with 4+ years of experience architecting, building, and deploying data processing systems and analytics that manage complex logic and visualize critical enterprise data. Saved $250k+ in vendor contracts by architecting and implementing an enterprise cloud migration and integration that eliminated our legacy CRM dependency. Expert at delivering integrations and analytics autonomously with primary experience in: SQL, PL/SQL, Python, Java, Bash, and LookML.

skills_data.label: Languages
skills_data.text: SQL, PL/SQL, Python, Java, Bash, TypeScript, JavaScript, SOQL, Apex

skills_data.label: Analytics
skills_data.text: Looker, Tableau, React, Statistical Analysis, Dashboard Embedding, Business Intelligence

skills_data.label: Data
skills_data.text: OracleDB, Linux, AWS Lambda, AWS DynamoDB, PostgreSQL, AWS S3, REST, OracleODI

skills_data.label: Compute Optimization
skills_data.text: Parallelism, Data Modeling, Normalization, Async Design, Compiler & Query Optimization

skills_data.label: Infrastructure & DevOps
skills_data.text: Linux, Docker, Jenkins, GitHub, GitLab, Dynatrace, Rundeck Automation, Oracle ODI

bullets.label: Migration Impact
bullets.text: Key leader in a CRM Cloud modernization, consolidating 3 department CRMs with dependencies across 6+ systems by architecting the enterprise data model, migrating 30M+ records during a fixed production cutover with zero downtime.

bullets.label: Data Engineering
bullets.text: Enabled retirement of the legacy CRM, avoiding $250k+ in vendor/contract costs by achieving 99.9% day-one data integrity (validated by 3 departments) building custom parsing and normalization pipelines for multiple non-standard data structures.

bullets.label: Cross-Team Ownership
bullets.text: Served as sole migration engineer while partnering with the integrations/API team and a 15-person implementation team; drove requirements, de-risked edge cases, and managed vendor deliverables to hit launch timelines.

bullets.label: Orchestration Platform
bullets.text: Built a dependency-aware migration orchestration engine with retries, batching, and concurrency controls. Dynamically managing real time data ingestion and anomalies from vendor systems.

bullets.label: High Speed Processing
bullets.text: Designed event driven architecture for high speed, low latency of thousands of records/hour. This turns batched over night processes into real-time pipelines, bringing data to consumers in finance and investments. Enabling faster operations, audits, insights, and interventions.

bullets.label: Python Automation
bullets.text: Built a Python documentation pipeline consolidating 5+ sources into a self-updating SharePoint wiki with ServiceNow links, cutting onboarding time 50%+, standardizing processes, and boosting development velocity.

bullets.label: Architecture SME
bullets.text: Acted as enterprise SME for mission-critical financial systems and strict regulatory compliance, guiding architecture decisions and untangling cross-system dependencies to reduce technical debt and enable a loosely coupled modernization path. This boosts agility, cuts maintenance costs, and passes audits.

bullets.label: Self-Service Analytics
bullets.text: Built self-service member data dashboards (Looker/LookML), reducing ticket volume and enabling cross-functional teams to access data without engineering support. This empowered teams to make data-driven decisions, improved operational efficiency, and enhanced member services.

bullets.label: Modeling
bullets.text: Owned, managed, and maintained the upgrades, enhancements, defects, devops and development life cycle of modeling web applications contributing to the adoption of agile methodology. This improved collaboration, accelerated delivery, and enhanced the overall quality of the applications.

bullets.label: ETL + Business Logic
bullets.text: Built production ETL pipelines ingesting 3rd-party vendor sources into the enterprise warehouse as a core repository for enterprise data. Implementing complex eligibility and projection logic in PL/SQL and SQL.

bullets.label: Data Quality Monitoring
bullets.text: Partnered with enterprise engineering to implement proactive data validation and monitoring using advanced SQL (CTEs, window functions, cross-database joins), preventing downstream production issues.

bullets.label: Cloud Architect
bullets.text: Architect of serverless high speed, low cost, web applications on AWS for small business clients, architecting cloud-native solutions with S3 (static hosting), CloudFront (CDN), MariaDB, Lambda, SQS, SNS, and DynamoDB.

bullets.label: Frontend Design
bullets.text: Design and build responsive React frontends with modern UI/UX principles, focusing on performance optimization, accessibility, and seamless user experiences across devices to enhance customer engagement, market visibility, and generate leads for small business clients.

bullets.label: Full Development Lifecycle
bullets.text: Implement full development lifecycle: requirements gathering, architecture, design, AWS infrastructure provisioning via SAM and Cloud Formation, CI/CD pipeline setup and integration with GitHub, and ongoing optimization. Focus on serverless-first architecture to minimize operational overhead and maximize cost efficiency for small business budgets.

education.degree: M.S., Computer Science, AI, & Machine Learning

certifications.name: Machine Learning with Python Professional Certificate by Anaconda
Network Automation Professional Certificate by Arista Networks
